1#pragma once
2
3#include "meta/type_id.hpp"
4#include "meta/type_list.hpp"
5#include <bitset>
6#include <cstdint>
7
8namespace world {
9 // Runtime representation of a set number of unique component types.
10 struct Signature {
11 uint64_t m_bitset = 0; // To be dynamically expanded if exceeded.
12
13 // Testwhether rhs completely overlaps.
14 inline bool matches(const Signature& rhs) const {
15 return (m_bitset & rhs.m_bitset) == rhs.m_bitset; // rhs completely overlaps
16 }
17
18 // SEt a single bit.
19 inline void set(int n) {
20 m_bitset |= 1ull << n;
21 }
22 inline void clear(int n) {
23 m_bitset &= ~(1ull << n);
24 }
25
26 inline bool get(int n) {
27 return m_bitset & (1ull << n);
28 }
29 } ;
30
31 // Constexpr representation of a canonicalised collection of types.
32 template <typename... Ts>
33 struct Archetype {
34 using canonical_types = typename meta::sort_types<meta::type_list<Ts...>>::type;
35
36 static constexpr size_t size = (sizeof(Ts) + ...);
37 static constexpr size_t length = sizeof...(Ts);
38
39 static const inline Signature signature = [](){
40 Signature sig;
41 (sig.set(meta::type_index<Ts>()), ...);
42 return sig;
43 }();
44 };
45}
46
47#ifndef NDEBUG
48template<>
49struct std::formatter<world::Signature, char> {
50 constexpr auto parse(std::format_parse_context& ctx) {
51 return ctx.begin();
52 }
53
54 template <typename FormatContext>
55 auto format(const world::Signature& sig, FormatContext& ctx) const {
56 auto out = ctx.out();
57 *out++ = std::bitset<64>(sig.m_bitset);
58 return out;
59 }
60};
61#endif

size_t type_index()
